changeSet.author: listing
changeSet.sql: CREATE TRIGGER trg_update_amp_public_data_last_updated BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE OF court_centre_id, type_id, allocated, start_date, end_date, estimated_minutes, week_commencing_start_date, week_commencing_end_date ON hearing FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION fn_update_amp_public_data_last_updated();

rollback.sql: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_update_amp_public_data_last_updated ON hearing
